title: Diff_P10_ABreak ComplexNUMsEXT
description:
Important:-
  1. 'Angles in the Same segment' is later on.... because i want you to take a day's pause and come up with a proof of yourself....

  2. #45 'Sketching (z-1)÷(z-i) WHEN IT's REAL'
I want you to think in terms of the last few videos just before that....


————————————————————————
Notes:-
  0. this playlist has all complexNUMs videos from:-             [#55-#123]
'2016_nov_2017_jan ComplexMadness'

  1. Complex Roots (5 of 5) requires GEOMETRIC PROGRESSION.... you can learn series first.... before coming back to ComplexNUMsEXT

  2. in the first 57 videos....
probably only 6 of them are actually inside Mar20-May2 of 2021.... :woozy:

————————————————————————
These 5 kinda supposed to be in 
Jan20-Mar20 playlist....

  1. Polynomials with Trig. Solutions 3of3
- right after:- 
Square Roots of a Complex Number (3of3)

  2. Solving Higher Degree Trig Eq. 3of3
right after:-
Equations with Complex Solutions (2of2)

  3. Complex Conjugate Root Theorem (2of2) right after:-
Solving Higher Degree Trig Eq. (3of3)

  4. working with moduli and Arguments (Proof Question)
  5. Argument of the Complex Conjugate

but are here :woozy:
